title: You vs the fastest things ever built (km/h)

source.name: Parker Solar Probe record speed vs galactic ride

notes: Real published figures, rounded. Parker Solar Probe reached ~692,000 km/h (430,000 mph) at its December 2024 perihelion — the fastest human-made object ever. Galactic orbital speed ~828,000 km/h; jet airliner cruise ~900 km/h.
